---
title: "Event Reflection: Industry Meetup in Phnom Penh"
date: 2025-12-02
description: "A look back at discussions between students, alumni, and engineering leaders."
image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1531058020387-3be344556be6?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
categories: [Events, Networking]
---

The meetup focused on practical job-readiness, industry expectations, and ways to build long-term engineering careers in Cambodia.
